privileged_info_summary: The target website books.toscrape.com is a real, publicly accessible e-commerce sandbox site designed for scraping practice. It contains 1,000 book products across 50 pages (20 products per page). Product prices are available in pound sterling format (£) using the CSS selector .price_color, and star ratings are available using the CSS selector .star-rating with class attribute values such as 'Three', 'One', etc. Both CSS selectors and the expected minimum row count of 20 are verified against actual website HTML. The task requires exporting custom extraction data and internal HTML report CSV files, both of which are feasible given the website structure.
